name: life-os
description: Your personal Life OS — a local-first command center for tasks, projects, documents, and knowledge.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n server,client,electron -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
